prompt: Watercolour painting — an ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5). A running track at a sports meet, nine young runners of different sizes poised in their starting blocks, tense and ready, a bright charged moment just before the starting gun. Anticipation in the air, glowing against a dark ground. Loose luminous watercolour washes, soft wet-on-wet colour bleeds, granulation and visible paper grain, glowing against the dark ground. No text, no labels.
alt: A running track with starting blocks, nine runners poised, a tense bright moment before the gun
